CustomField.description: You must inform directly the Data Solution Team about any modification of this recipient email for sending existing report. In case of a new request, please create a request through Work Together Process object in Salesforce
CustomField.inlineHelpText: You must inform directly the Data Solution Team about any modification of this recipient email for sending report. In case of a new request, please create a request through Work Together Process object in Salesforce
CustomField.label: Data Solution Email
